evals.prompt: Get A-share stock industry classification data and show me the first 10 stocks
evals.expected_output: DataFrame with stock industry data, showing first 10 rows with columns: code, code_name, industry, industryClassification, updateDate

assertions.name: has_first_10_stocks
assertions.description: Output should contain first 10 stocks from the dataset

assertions.name: has_required_columns
assertions.description: Output should contain code, code_name, industry, industryClassification, updateDate columns

assertions.name: is_dataframe
assertions.description: Output should be a pandas DataFrame or similar tabular structure

evals.prompt: What are the top 5 industries by number of stocks in the Chinese market?
evals.expected_output: List of top 5 industries with stock counts, derived from industry classification data

assertions.name: has_stock_counts
assertions.description: Output should include number of stocks per industry

assertions.name: sorted_by_count
assertions.description: Industries should be sorted by stock count (descending)

evals.prompt: Find all stocks in the technology industry sector
evals.expected_output: DataFrame filtered to show only stocks in technology industry

assertions.name: technology_stocks_only
assertions.description: Output should only contain stocks classified as technology

assertions.name: has_multiple_stocks
assertions.description: Output should contain multiple technology stocks

assertions.name: correct_industry_filter
assertions.description: All stocks in output should have 'technology' or similar in industry field
